title: Firrkie
overview: Firrkie is a Bollywood action drama movie, directed by Ankoosh Bhatt. The movie stars Neil Nitin Mukesh, Karan Singh Grover, Jackie Shroff, Kay Kay Menon, and Sandeepa Dhar in lead roles.
